42.reason: [Error: Assignment operator '=' used instead of comparison '=='. This will always set fh2 to '+' and evaluate to true, causing incorrect addition instead of subtraction.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Assignment instead of comparison: 'if(fh2='+')' always assigns '+' and evaluates to true, so sum always added incorrectly.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Assignment instead of comparison: should be '=='. This causes the condition to always be true, so sum always adds the final term, never subtracts.
